query:
SELECT 
  cityName,
  rentFee,
  propertyFee,
  utilityFee,
  consumablesFee,
  cleaningFee,
  phoneFee,
  deferredPayment,
  expressFee,
  promotionFee,
  otherFee,
  teacherFee,
  transportFee,
  totalExpense,
  partnerShare
FROM city_monthly_expenses
WHERE cityName IN ('武汉', '济南')
AND month = '2026-01'
ORDER BY cityName;
